scripts.storybook:language-chooser:all: concurrently --names svelte,react --prefix name --prefix-colors cyan,green "npm run --workspace components/language-chooser/svelte/language-chooser-svelte-daisyui storybook" "npx wait-on http://localhost:6007/index.json && npm run --workspace components/language-chooser/react/language-chooser-react-mui storybook:composed"

//allowScripts._note: Why each package below is allowed to run install scripts under strict-allow-scripts.
//allowScripts.@swc/core: postinstall (node postinstall.js) links the platform-specific native SWC binary used across the build/test toolchain
//allowScripts.@tailwindcss/oxide: postinstall (scripts/install.js) links the native Rust 'Oxide' engine for Tailwind v4 (svelte-daisyui styling)
//allowScripts.esbuild: postinstall (install.js) installs the platform-specific esbuild native binary used by Vite
//allowScripts.fsevents: postinstall builds the macOS-only native file-watching addon; transitive via Vite/chokidar/Playwright, so macOS installs fail without it (no-op on Windows/Linux)
//allowScripts.nx: postinstall (bin/post-install) sets up the Nx daemon and native packages that drive the monorepo task runner
//allowScripts.svelte-preprocess: postinstall is only an informational echo (no build step); allowlisted because strict-allow-scripts gates every install script, even a harmless one
